perturbation.original_text: "ABOUT CUSTOMER" means any individual or entity who has registered with ebix either (i) through the registration process on the Insurance Center or (ii) registers with ebix after accessing the ebix Site from a link on the About Network.
perturbation.changed_text: "ABOUT CUSTOMER" means any individual who has registered with ebix either (i) through the registration process on the Insurance Center or (ii) registers with ebix after accessing the ebix Site from a link on the About Network.
perturbation.explanation: The original text defines 'ABOUT CUSTOMER' as 'any individual or entity'. The modified text defines 'ABOUT CUSTOMER' as 'any individual'. This introduces a contradiction because the term is used elsewhere in the contract where it may be interpreted to include entities, thereby creating ambiguity in the obligations related to 'ABOUT CUSTOMER DATA', which is specifically tied to the definition of 'ABOUT CUSTOMER'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: eBix shall own and retain all right, title and interest in and to any About Customer data generated on the Insurance Center, and nothing in this Agreement shall confer in About any right, title or interest in the About Customer data (except to the extent that it is duplicative of About User data and as hereinafter provided). Upon request by About, ebix shall provide About with About Customer Data in the aggregated form, which aggregated form shall be jointly owned by ebix and About. During the Term and any time thereafter, eBix shall not sell, lease, transfer, disseminate, display or otherwise disclose any About User data to any third party or otherwise use the same for any reason other than as set forth herein. However, ebix shall not be prohibited from selling, leasing, transferring, disseminating, displaying or otherwise disclosing any About Customer Data, as defined in Section 1 above.
perturbation.justification: The original text defined 'ABOUT CUSTOMER' as 'any individual or entity', whereas the changed text defines it as 'any individual'. This creates a contradiction with the 'Contradicted Text' because the original definition includes both individuals and entities, giving ebix the right to disseminate 'About Customer Data'. By changing 'any individual or entity' to 'any individual', the definition of 'About Customer Data' is restricted to only individuals, but the contradicted text still refers to the broader original definition that may include entities. Therefore, the modified text introduces ambiguity and directly contradicts the original intent and creates uncertainty about what data ebix is allowed to disseminate.

perturbation.original_text: "INSURANCE CENTER" means a channel accessible from the About Site Home Page and other Links or Advertising Placements, created and maintained by ebix hereunder and on which (i) the About Marks and About Wrapper appear, and (ii) the ebix Content is displayed pursuant to this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: "INSURANCE CENTER" means a webpage accessible from the About Site Home Page and other Links or Advertising Placements, created and maintained by About hereunder and on which (i) the About Marks and About Wrapper appear, and (ii) the ebix Content is displayed pursuant to this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that the 'INSURANCE CENTER' is created and maintained by 'ebix'. The modified text states that the 'INSURANCE CENTER' is created and maintained by 'About'. This creates a direct contradiction, especially concerning the obligations to maintain the 'INSURANCE CENTER', impacting sections detailing About and Ebix responsibilities for maintaining links and content.
perturbation.contradicted_location: 3.2 DEVELOPMENT, OPERATION AND ADMINISTRATION OF INSURANCE CENTER; EXCLUSIVITY
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Insurance Center shall be hosted solely by ebix and contained in an About Wrapper and ebix shall, during the Term, provide site maintenance services relative to the Insurance Center substantially as provided for the ebix Site from time to time, subject to the uptime requirements as set forth in Section 13.4 [TERMINATION AND SURVIVAL].
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the contradicted text. The original text defined 'INSURANCE CENTER' as maintained by 'ebix', whereas the changed text defines it as maintained by 'About'. The contradicted text explicitly states that 'ebix' hosts and maintains the 'INSURANCE CENTER'. This creates a clear conflict of responsibility, violating the agreement.

perturbation.original_text: Litigation initiated by ebix shall be filed in New York, whereas litigation initiated by About shall be filed in Illinois.
perturbation.changed_text: Litigation initiated by ebix shall be filed in Illinois, whereas litigation initiated by About shall be filed in New York.
perturbation.explanation: The original text specified that ebix should initiate litigation in New York and About in Illinois. This modification reverses that, causing a direct contradiction in the legal venue for disputes. This change creates significant confusion and potential legal battles regarding where lawsuits must be filed, directly contradicting the original intent and making enforcement difficult. This contradicts what was specified in the agreement initially.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement will be governed by the laws of the state where a suit is properly filed under the terms of this paragraph, being either Illinois or New York, and without giving effect to conflict of law principles. Litigation initiated by ebix shall be filed in Illinois, whereas litigation initiated by About shall be filed in New York. Both parties submit to personal jurisdiction of Illinois or New York, to effectuate the terms of this paragraph, and further agree that any cause of action arising under this Agreement shall be brought in state or federal courts of the States of New York or Illinois, counties of New York or Cook, respectively.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the contradicted text by reversing the venues for litigation initiated by Ebix and About. The original text in the contradicted text states 'Litigation initiated by ebix shall be filed in Illinois, whereas litigation initiated by About shall be filed in New York.' The changed text causes the parties to have an agreement that conflicts with itself and creates a direct contradiction, fulfilling the definition of misaligned terminology. This will create issues in the event of a dispute.
